monster.name: ZalharaLorenn
monster.description: A middle-aged woman, anonymous and reassuring in appearance — exactly as she wants. Brown hair pulled back, round glasses, modest but clean scholar's clothing. She always carries a leather bag full of scrolls and books. She speaks in a calm, cultured tone, citing sacred texts of Tyr with ease. Around her neck she wears a ring on a chain — the **Ring of the Evanescent Shadow**. If anyone asks, she says it's a family heirloom. The ring bears an inscription: *"turn left."* Distinctive trait: she is so convincing in her role as a scholar that even Tyr's priests find her credible. Her best weapon is the trust she inspires. Role: spy in service of Vecna
